name: 6sense Revenue AI Platform API
what_it_does: 6sense Revenue AI REST API for B2B account-based marketing and revenue intelligence. Enables AI agents to query account intent signals, retrieve predictive scoring data, access segment memberships, and integrate 6sense buying stage intelligence into sales and marketing workflows. 6sense provides AI-driven account identification and prioritization.
use_cases: Querying account intent scores and buying stage predictions from sales prioritization agents
Retrieving segment membership and ICP match data from ABM campaign agents
Accessing anonymous visitor identification data from marketing intelligence agents
Integrating 6sense account intelligence into CRM enrichment and scoring agents
not_for: B2C marketing (6sense is B2B ABM focused)
best_when: A B2B marketing or sales team using 6sense wants AI agents to surface account intent signals, prioritize outreach, and integrate buying stage intelligence into CRM and outreach workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Intent data and anonymous identification involves third-party behavioral tracking. Review GDPR and CCPA compliance before using 6sense data in agent workflows.

auth.notes: 6sense API token authentication. Tokens available in 6sense settings. Account-scoped access.

pricing.paid_tiers: 6sense team and enterprise pricing; Ads, Sales, and Revenue packages
pricing.notes: Enterprise ABM platform with significant investment. API access included with subscription.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Intent data involves third-party behavioral tracking — GDPR/CCPA review required
No public MCP server — REST API integration required
API documentation is limited for non-enterprise customers
Anonymous visitor identification data must be handled per privacy regulations
Rate limits undocumented — throttle for bulk account queries
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Third-party behavioral intent data for B2B account identification. SOC2, GDPR. CCPA compliance for US audience data. API key auth.

security_score_components.security_notes: Third-party behavioral intent data. GDPR and CCPA compliance for behavioral tracking. SOC2.
